_comment: Configurable display copy for Just a Little Fun. Edit freely. Tokens in {curly braces} are filled in at runtime. Available tokens are noted per section. Host reads this from ./data/phrases.json; the player page reads the same file.
wipeTransitions: It's a great day for racing!

milestones._tokens: {field} = number of runners, {distance} = metres, {terrain} = surface, {weather} = conditions label, {leader} = current leader name (UPPER CASE applied automatically)

raceCalls.down: {horse} IS DOWN — RACE OVER FOR THEM
raceCalls.photoNose: PHOTO FINISH — STEWARDS WILL DETERMINE THE RESULT

placement._comment: Player-side end-of-game placement copy. rank 1/2/3 and last are special; middle-of-field scales by band (top/mid/back).

first.headline: Champion punter!
first.subMany: You topped the tote and took the whole room. Drinks are on you.
first.subSolo: Last one standing — the title is yours.

second.headline: So, so close
second.sub: Pipped right at the post. A whisker off the top spot — unlucky.

third.headline: On the podium
third.sub: A spot on the dais and bragging rights to match. Solid card.

last.headline: Wooden spoon
last.sub: Someone had to prop up the field — might as well wear it with pride. There's always next card.

midTop.headline: Top of the chasers
midTop.sub: Just missed the medals but well clear of the pack. Nicely played.

midMid.headline: Mid-field finish
midMid.sub: Right in the thick of it — a few bets away from the top end. Respectable night.

midBack.headline: Down the field
midBack.sub: Hung in there near the back, but you dodged the wooden spoon. We'll call that a win.
